contributing.headline: 59% of your usage was at >150k context
contributing.detail: Longer sessi ns are more expensive even when cached. /compact mid-task, /clear when switching to new tasks.

contributing.headline: 40% of your usage came from subagent-heavy sessions
contributing.detail: Each subagent runs its own requests. Be deliberate about spawning them — and consider configuring a cheaper model for simpler subagents.

contributing.headline: 10% of your usage came from subagents under
contributing.detail: "superpowers:subagent-driven-development" If this runs frequently, consider configuring its subagents with a cheaper model or tightening their prompts.

contributing.headline: 22% of your usage came from plugin "superpowers"
contributing.detail: Review what this plugin contributes — its agents, skills, and MCP tools all count toward your limit.
